title: EQ - Custom EQ, change some values, Save EQ, dialog present
scenario: Custom EQ save confirmation dialog does not appear or does not match Figma spec after saving EQ settings
steps: Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings
Adjust one or more frequency band sliders (e.g., 32Hz, 64Hz, 125Hz, etc.) to new values
expected: A dialog appears with the message "Your custom EQ has been saved." and an OK button at the bottom. The UI matches the Figma spec.
